# Gemma Agent — documentation index for LLMs
# Read docs/REPO_MAP.md + AGENTS.md first — avoids false "no tests / no CI" reviews

- docs/REPO_MAP.md — One-page map: tests, CI, layout (read first)
- docs/CI.md — GitHub Actions jobs + local equivalents
- AGENTS.md — For AI reviewers: evidence checklist, common false criticisms
- README.md — Project showcase: badges, tests, Docker, capabilities
- CONTRIBUTING.md — Contributing — GitHub tab
- SECURITY.md — Security policy
- pytest.ini — Pytest configuration (407 files, 2573+ cases in tests/)
- pyproject.toml — Project metadata + ruff CI config
- .github/workflows/ci.yml — CI: ruff + pytest + privacy
- .github/workflows/release-guard.yml — Release guard workflow
- docs/AGENT_LOOP.md — Plan→Execute→Verify loops (honest defaults vs opt-in)
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — Architecture with Mermaid diagram
- docs/MEMORY.md — STM / MTM / LTM memory tiers
- docs/SELF_HEALING.md — Healers, safe mode, auto-rollback
- docs/ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA.md — Test gates and evidence
- docs/SYSTEM_REQUIREMENTS.md — Proven hardware: 1GB+VPN (min), 4GB VPS (prod), LAN lab
- docs/DEPLOY.md — VPS, Docker, systemd, backups
- docs/PUBLISH_CHECKLIST.md — Publish repo on GitHub
- docs/index.md — Documentation hub (EN)
- docs/index.ru.md — Documentation hub (RU)
- docs/getting-started/quickstart.md — Quickstart EN
- docs/getting-started/quickstart.ru.md — Quickstart RU
- docs/getting-started/installation.md — Installation EN
- docs/getting-started/configuration.md — Configuration EN
- docs/getting-started/public-build.md — Public build scope
- docs/user-guide/telegram.md — Telegram usage
- docs/user-guide/admin-ops.md — Admin commands and ops
- docs/user-guide/panel.md — gemma_panel.sh
- docs/user-guide/troubleshooting.md — Troubleshooting
- docs/features/overview.md — Features matrix
- docs/features/web-search.md — SearXNG
- docs/features/memory.md — Mem0
- docs/features/voice.md — Voice STT/TTS
- docs/features/modules.md — 19 modules
- docs/security/security-model.md — Security (honest)
- docs/developer-guide/architecture.md — Architecture (detailed)
- docs/developer-guide/testing.md — Testing
- docs/reference/environment-variables.md — Essential env vars
- docs/reference/scripts-cli.md — Scripts reference
- scripts/print_repo_stats.py — Verifiable test/CI counts for docs
- scripts/backup.sh — Backup data/ and config
- config/power_agent.env.fragment — Opt-in fuller agent loop env keys
- scripts/apply_power_agent_env.py — Apply power_agent profile to .env
- Dockerfile — Container image
- docker-compose.yml — Docker deploy (native recommended on 1GB; compose from 2GB+)
